metadata.instruction: Recover the file Task ID 79.jpg from Recycle Bin and verify whether it is restored to its previous location in Documents > Task 79 folder.
metadata.context: I accidentally deleted a file with the name Task ID 79.jpg.

l3.rationale: Type-ahead on the desktop list selects Recycle Bin.

l4.rationale: Opened Recycle Bin and moved through the item list to focus the deleted file Task ID 79.

l5.rationale: These actions navigate into the Recycle Bin area and focus the deleted-item list, setting up recovery.
